careers.title: IAS Officer (Indian Administrative Service)
careers.description: India's premier administrative service. IAS officers manage district administration, implement government policies, and lead development projects.
careers.rajasthan_relevance: Rajasthan cadre IAS — manages key districts & departments

careers.title: IPS Officer (Indian Police Service)
careers.description: India's premier police service. IPS officers lead law enforcement, intelligence, and security operations.

careers.title: RAS Officer (Rajasthan Administrative Service)
careers.description: Rajasthan's premier state administrative service. RAS officers manage district-level administration across Rajasthan.
careers.rajasthan_relevance: Most sought-after state govt job in Rajasthan

careers.title: RPS Officer (Rajasthan Police Service)
careers.description: Rajasthan Police Service officer — leads police operations at district level.

careers.title: Indian Army Officer (via NDA)
careers.description: Commission as an officer in the Indian Army after 12th through the National Defence Academy.

careers.title: Indian Army Officer (via CDS/UPSC)
careers.description: Commission as an army officer after graduation through Combined Defence Services exam.

careers.title: Army Agniveer (Soldier)
careers.description: 4-year service as Agniveer in Indian Army. 25% retained as regular soldiers after 4 years.

careers.title: Indian Air Force Pilot (Flying Branch)
careers.description: Fly fighter jets, transport aircraft, and helicopters for the Indian Air Force.

careers.title: Commercial Pilot (Airlines)
careers.description: Fly commercial aircraft for airlines like IndiGo, Air India, SpiceJet. Requires CPL license.

exams.name: DGCA CPL Exam + Flying Hours (200+ hours)

careers.title: Air Hostess / Cabin Crew
careers.description: Provide passenger safety and service on domestic and international flights for airlines.
job_locations: Major Airports - Delhi, Mumbai, Jaipur, etc.

careers.title: Bank PO (IBPS PO)
careers.description: Probationary Officer in nationalized banks. Manages branch operations, loans, and customer relations.

careers.title: Bank Clerk (IBPS Clerk)
careers.description: Front-line banking role handling customer transactions, account management, and services.

careers.title: SBI PO (State Bank of India - PO)
careers.description: Officer at India's largest bank — State Bank of India. Prestigious banking career.

careers.title: RRB NTPC (Railways Non-Technical)
careers.description: Non-technical graduate-level posts in Indian Railways — Station Master, Goods Guard, Senior Clerk, etc.

careers.title: RRB Group D (Railways Helper/Track Maintainer)
careers.description: Entry-level technical roles in Indian Railways — Track Maintainer, Helper, Porter, etc.

careers.title: SSC CGL (Combined Graduate Level)
careers.description: Central government posts — Income Tax Inspector, CBI, Central Excise, Auditor, Accountant, etc.

careers.title: SSC CHSL (Combined Higher Secondary Level)
careers.description: Central govt posts for 12th pass — LDC, JSA, DEO, PA/SA in various ministries and departments.

careers.title: REET Teacher (Rajasthan Eligibility Exam for Teachers)
careers.description: Government school teacher in Rajasthan. Level 1 (Class 1-5) and Level 2 (Class 6-8).
careers.rajasthan_relevance: Rajasthan's most popular teaching exam — lakhs of vacancies

careers.title: KVS Teacher (Kendriya Vidyalaya)
careers.description: Teacher in prestigious Kendriya Vidyalayas across India. PRT, TGT, and PGT levels.

careers.title: School Lecturer (Rajasthan RPSC Grade 1)
careers.description: Senior teacher at Class 11-12 level in Rajasthan government colleges and senior secondary schools.

careers.title: Patwari (Rajasthan)
careers.description: Village-level revenue official responsible for land records, crop records, and government schemes.
careers.rajasthan_relevance: One of the most applied exams in Rajasthan — lakhs of vacancies

careers.title: Police Constable (Rajasthan Police)
careers.description: Frontline police officer maintaining law and order in Rajasthan.

careers.title: Sub-Inspector (SI) Rajasthan Police
careers.description: Officer-level police role managing police stations and criminal investigations in Rajasthan.

careers.title: Junior Engineer - Electrical (RVUNL/RSEB)
careers.description: Technical engineer role in Rajasthan electricity boards — RVUNL, JVVNL, AVVNL, JDVVNL.

careers.title: Forest Guard (Rajasthan Forest Dept)
careers.description: Protect and manage forest resources, wildlife, and national parks in Rajasthan.
job_locations: Rajasthan forests — Kota, Sawai Madhopur, Barmer, Jaisalmer

careers.title: CRPF Sub-Inspector (SI)
careers.description: Officer in Central Reserve Police Force — India's largest paramilitary force.

careers.title: Software Engineer (IT Industry)
careers.description: Design, develop, and maintain software applications. India's largest private sector employer of graduates.
job_locations: Bangalore, Hyderabad, Pune, Mumbai, Delhi, Remote

careers.title: Data Scientist / AI Engineer
careers.description: Analyze large datasets to derive business insights. Build ML models and AI solutions.

careers.title: CA (Chartered Accountant)
careers.description: India's most respected finance qualification. Auditing, taxation, corporate finance, and advisory.
selection_process: CA Foundation → Intermediate (3 years articleship) → CA Final

careers.title: CS (Company Secretary)
careers.description: Corporate governance expert. Mandatory in listed companies. Handles legal compliance and shareholder relations.

careers.title: Doctor (MBBS / MD)
careers.description: Medical doctor providing healthcare services. Highly respected profession in India.
selection_process: NEET UG → MBBS (5.5 years) → Internship → NEET PG for MD/MS
job_locations: Pan India (Govt hospitals, Private hospitals, Own clinic)

careers.title: Nurse (B.Sc Nursing / Staff Nurse)
careers.description: Essential healthcare professional — patient care, medication management, and clinical support in hospitals.

exams.name: NEET UG (optional for B.Sc Nursing at top colleges)
Govt Hospital Nurse Recruitment (AIIMS, State Health Dept)

selection_process: B.Sc Nursing (4 years) or GNM (3 years)

careers.title: Pharmacist (D.Pharm / B.Pharm)
careers.description: Dispense medicines, counsel patients, and ensure medication safety in hospitals, clinics, and pharmacies.

careers.title: Hotel Manager / Hospitality Manager
careers.description: Manage hotel operations — front office, housekeeping, food & beverage, guest relations.
job_locations: Jaipur, Udaipur, Jodhpur, Mumbai, Delhi, Goa, International

careers.title: Professional Chef / Executive Chef
careers.description: Create and lead culinary experiences in hotels, restaurants, cruise ships, and broadcast.

exams.name: Culinary institute entrance / Hotel Management JEE

careers.title: Journalist / Reporter
careers.description: Report news, investigate stories, and inform the public through print, digital, TV, and radio.
selection_process: BJMC/Mass Comm degree or PG Diploma

careers.title: Fashion Designer
careers.description: Design clothing, accessories, and textiles for fashion brands, boutiques, and export houses.
job_locations: Jaipur (textile hub), Delhi, Mumbai, Export houses
careers.rajasthan_relevance: Jaipur is a major textile and handicraft hub — good local opportunities

careers.title: Advocate / Lawyer
careers.description: Practice law in courts, advise clients, and represent parties in civil, criminal, and corporate matters.
job_locations: High Courts, District Courts — Jaipur, Jodhpur, Ajmer

careers.title: Civil Judge (Rajasthan Judicial Service)
careers.description: Lower court judge appointed through Rajasthan Judicial Services exam after law degree.

careers.title: Entrepreneur / Business Owner
careers.description: Start and run your own business. India has many govt schemes supporting first-gen entrepreneurs.
careers.rajasthan_relevance: Rajasthan Startup Policy 2015 & Industrial Investment Promotion Scheme available

careers.title: DRDO Scientist (Defence Research)
careers.description: Research and develop defence equipment, missiles, and systems for India's national security.
job_locations: Pan India (DRDO labs — Jodhpur has DRDO lab)

careers.title: ISRO Scientist / Engineer
careers.description: Work on India's space missions — satellites, rockets, planetary missions at ISRO.

careers.title: ONGC Engineer / Geoscientist
careers.description: Work in India's largest PSU — Oil and Natural Gas Corporation. Exploration, drilling, and production.
careers.rajasthan_relevance: ONGC has major operations in Barmer-Sanchor area of Rajasthan

careers.title: Digital Marketer / Social Media Manager
careers.description: Grow brands through SEO, social media, paid ads, content, and email marketing.

careers.title: Graphic Designer / UI-UX Designer
careers.description: Create visual content for brands, apps, websites, and advertising campaigns.

careers.title: Agriculture Officer (Rajasthan)
careers.description: Government officer providing agricultural guidance, scheme implementation, and support to farmers.

careers.title: ITI Electrician / Technician
careers.description: Skilled electrician working in industries, electricity boards, railways, or self-employed.
selection_process: ITI (2 years) → Apprenticeship → Job placement or Recruitment exam

careers.title: Social Worker / NGO Professional
careers.description: Work with NGOs, UN agencies, and Govt on development, education, health, and social justice programs.
selection_process: BSW/MSW degree or relevant work experience
job_locations: All India (especially rural Rajasthan — MNREGA, Jal Jeevan etc.)
